Class DefaultExtensionRegistry

java.lang.Object
org.fireflyframework.plugin.core.DefaultExtensionRegistry
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
public class DefaultExtensionRegistry extends Object implements org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
Thread-safe implementation of ExtensionRegistry. Uses concurrent data structures for safe concurrent access.
